# Agents

> **Context engine:** [[Hermes LCM Context Engine — System Overview]] — the transcript-tier lossless
> context engine (`hermes-lcm` DAG summarizer + recoverable raw store). It runs as `context.engine: lcm`
> on the agents listed below (the rest run the built-in compressor):

```lcm-agents
apollo, aegis
```

See ~/.hermes/plans/2026-06-05_apollo-orchestrator-aegis-breakglass-spec.md for the Apollo/Aegis ownership split.

Aegis remains the break-glass recovery identity.
